summary: Completed testing of Code Quality Round 2 fixes for Printsout e-commerce app. All 15 backend API tests passed. All frontend pages load correctly with refactored sub-components working properly. Component splits (Navbar, DesignEditor, AdminPayments, AdminLogin) verified functional.
action_items: Minor: AdminContext.js line 51 still uses hardcoded 60000 instead of SESSION_CHECK_INTERVAL_MS constant
critical_code_review_comments: AdminContext.js should import and use SESSION_CHECK_INTERVAL_MS from utils/constants.js instead of hardcoded 60000 at line 51

test_credentials.note: Admin requires 2FA with TOTP code from Microsoft Authenticator

context_for_next_testing_agent: All Code Quality Round 2 fixes verified: (1) Navbar split into MobileMenu + UserDropdown sub-components - working, (2) DesignEditor split into DesignTools + DesignCanvas - all 4 tabs (upload, adjust, text, color) working, (3) AdminPayments split into PaymentMethodCards - working, (4) AdminLogin split into LoginForms + TwoFactorForms - login and 2FA flow working, (5) AdminSettings split into ShippingTaxSection + DiscountCodesSection + TwoFASection - working, (6) constants.js has SESSION_CHECK_INTERVAL_MS used by AuthContext, (7) No console.log/console.error in production code, (8) XSS sanitization with DOMPurify verified in AdminContent.js and ContentPage.js, (9) conftest.py uses os.environ.get for all test secrets. Minor issue: AdminContext.js still has hardcoded 60000 instead of using the constant.

verified_features.homepage_loads: ✓ Homepage loads with refactored Navbar (MobileMenu, UserDropdown sub-components)
verified_features.products_page_loads: ✓ Products page loads at /produkter with 14 products
verified_features.design_editor_loads: ✓ Design editor loads at /design/:id with DesignTools + DesignCanvas sub-components
verified_features.design_editor_tabs: ✓ All 4 tabs render (upload, adjust, text, color)
verified_features.checkout_page_loads: ✓ Checkout page loads at /kassa (redirects to cart when empty - expected)
verified_features.admin_login_page: ✓ Admin login page loads with LoginForms sub-component
verified_features.admin_2fa_flow: ✓ 2FA form appears after correct login (TwoFactorForms sub-component)
verified_features.xss_sanitization: ✓ DOMPurify.sanitize() used in AdminContent.js and ContentPage.js

code_quality_verification.magic_numbers_extracted: SESSION_CHECK_INTERVAL_MS in constants.js used by AuthContext
code_quality_verification.console_cleanup: No console.log/console.error found in production code
code_quality_verification.xss_protection: DOMPurify.sanitize() used in AdminContent.js and ContentPage.js
code_quality_verification.test_secrets: conftest.py uses os.environ.get for all secrets
